title: senecio pallidus
intro: Senecio pallidus, also known as the Pale Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its pale yellow daisy-like flowers and feathery foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Senecio pallidus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
